title: diospyros ferrea var. lateriflora
intro: Diospyros ferrea var. lateriflora, also known as the 'Later-flowering Ebony' or 'Later-flowering Persimmon', is a variety of Diospyros ferrea, a plant species in the Ebenaceae family. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to tropical Africa. Diospyros ferrea var. lateriflora is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. Diospyros ferrea var. lateriflora is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, and is also used in traditional medicine, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
